questionHtml: Outline the role of natural selection in animal behaviour.
markschemeHtml:
a. genetically based/innate behavior can be passed on to offspring ✔

b. behavior increases chances of survival and reproduction ✔

c. will increase in frequency/become more prevalent in a population ✔

meta.title: Outline the role of natural selection in animal behaviour.
breadcrumbLabels: Option A: Neurobiology and behaviour (Additional higher level topics)
